typography.header_font_style: Custom High-Contrast Serif with Stellar Glyph Integration
typography.layout_logic: Centered Hero Composition with Vertical Rhythm

geometry.construction: Rotated square (45°) with concave side insets forming four sharp tips
geometry.corner_treatment: Slightly rounded inner joints to avoid pixel sharpness

integration_rules: Primary usage replaces diacritic/dot elements (e.g., above 'i')
Acts as semantic anchor near initial capital (positioned optically above x-height)
Aligned to vertical stem centerline of anchor glyph
Maintains equal optical weight as serif terminals
visual_behavior: Filled with same gradient logic as main glyphs
Acts as focal highlight node in composition

stroke_treatment: Primary vertical stems remain solid with subtle inner gradient (#D9D2FF → #8A7CFF)
Hairline strokes retain crisp edges with minimal glow bleed
Selective stroke carving: micro incisions at joints to echo star geometry
serif_design: Sharp wedge serifs with inward curvature mirroring star concavity
Terminal ends slightly flared to match star point expansion
Serif thickness optically balanced against star stroke thickness
counter_design: Counters include subtle asymmetrical cuts inspired by star inner diamond
Rounded forms slightly squared-off at tension points
special_glyph_modifications: Rounded letters (a, o) include internal notch or highlight slit referencing star geometry
Vertical stems may include faint spectral reflection (purple-blue band)
No purely geometric purity—intentional optical distortion for elegance

spacing.kerning: Tight optical kerning with emphasis on rhythm continuity
spacing.baseline_alignment: Strict baseline, star element optically offset above

text_effects: Outer bloom (#4800FF, Gaussian blur, large radius)
Localized glow intensification at star element
Vertical gradient fill with subtle spectral variation
No drop shadows, only volumetric light diffusion

behavior: Star element acts as micro light emitter
Background glow remains defocused and secondary
Smooth luminance falloff with no hard edges

compositional_rules.spacing: Expansive negative space with strong central lockup
compositional_rules.depth: Foreground typography sharply rendered over blurred luminous layers
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Star-integrated logotype as primary focal system
compositional_rules.alignment: Strict center alignment with optical adjustments
compositional_rules.balance: Asymmetric light fields balanced by star anchor
compositional_rules.scale: Headline ~45% width; star occupies ~6–8% of width

suggested_animation: Micro shimmer on vertical stems (very low frequency)
